message.content:
@startuml
actor SalesClerk
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredUI" as UI
participant "ChangeOrderToBeingDeliveredController" as Controller
participant "ChangeAllToBeingDeliveredService" as Service
participant "OrderRepository" as Repository
participant "ChangeToBeingDeliveredService" as ChangeService

SalesClerk -> UI: 1 Update the status of dispatched orders to "Being delivered" for customer delivery.
UI -> Controller: 2 orderDispatched()
Controller -> Service: 3 orderDispatched()
Service -> Repository: 4 orderDispatched()
Repository --> UI: 5 ordersDispatched
UI --> SalesClerk: 6 Shows all the orders that are dispatched.
UI --> SalesClerk: 7 Asks to choose one of the orders
SalesClerk --> UI: 8 Selects the order he wants to change status
UI -> Controller: 9 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
Controller -> ChangeService: 10 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
ChangeService -> Repository: 11 changeToBeingDelivered(order)
Repository --> UI: 12 Successful change
UI --> SalesClerk: 13 Informs that is changed
@enduml
